title: filago psilantha
intro: Filago psilantha, also known as the sticky fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, due to its ability to promote healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection. Filago psilantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its health benefits.
